vibe: Elegant, feminine, modern boutique style with a clean minimalist approach, soft pastel colors, ample whitespace, and subtle micro-interactions.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Snug Simple & Resonant Stark - abundant whitespace, soft edges, no harsh lines.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento-inspired asymmetrical grids for featured categories. 4-column standard grid for product catalog.
spacing_and_layout.corners: rounded-2xl for main images and cards, rounded-full for buttons and badges (light skeuomorphism).

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-text_primary hover:bg-primary_hover rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-text_primary hover:border-accent hover:text-accent rounded-full px-8 py-3 transition-colors

cards.product_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-surface border border-transparent hover:border-border transition-all duration-500
cards.product_image: aspect-[3/4] object-cover w-full scale-100 group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 ease-out

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/20 transition-all
header.navigation: hidden md:flex gap-8 text-sm uppercase tracking-widest text-text_primary

hero.layout: min-h-[80vh] flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden rounded-b-3xl md:rounded-b-[4rem]
hero.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-white/40 via-transparent to-transparent z-10

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle scale up (1.05) on product images. Slow, easing transitions (duration-500).
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for product grids and typography.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Soft color fill transitions on icons, light tactile bounce on buttons.

hero_banner.description: Elegant fashion editorial hero image with dusty rose styling

hero_secondary.description: Dynamic low-angle shot of young women walking confidently in pastel suits

product_blusa.description: Elegant pastel pink women's blouse on white background

product_falda.description: Stylish pastel rose midi skirt on white background

product_vestido.description: Woman in white dress holding bouquet

texture_background.description: Subtle dusty rose and white gradient texture

iconography.style: stroke-width: 1.5, clean, unopinionated curves to match Outfit typography.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes per the required pattern.
Use Cormorant Garamond for all H1/H2 headings to establish the elegant boutique feel, and Outfit for UI text and paragraphs.
Do not use dark mode. The application is strictly a Light theme, utilizing soft pastel pinks, dusty rose accents, and pure white backgrounds.
Apply `rounded-2xl` to product images and cards for the 'Snug Simple' aesthetic trend.
Product images should have an aspect ratio of 3:4 to mimic high-end fashion photography.
The Header must be sticky with a backdrop-blur (Glassmorphism) using `bg-white/80` to maintain elegance without clutter.
Use the provided image URLs exactly as specified for their respective categories.
Follow the generous spacing philosophy: use `p-6`, `p-12` or larger for layout padding to maintain a clean, high-end e-commerce appearance.
